reviews.comment:
Geniales los chicos que te atienden nos ayudaron teníamos una goma baja y se preocuparon nos inflaron las ruedas se creyó que no inflaba  la rueda porque andaba mal el aparato nos hizo ir al otro surtido nos tuvo toda la paciencia y nos dió dirección de gomería las 24 hs

(Translated by Google)
The guys who serve you are great. They helped us. We had a low tire and they were concerned. They inflated the tires. They thought the tire wasn't inflating because the device was not working properly. They made us go to the other store. They were very patient with us and gave us directions to the tire shop 24 hours a day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSck9fQXF3RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good and fast service, especially considering the number of cars there were

reviews.comment:
Antes era mas familiar los chicos se juntaban a estudiar y nosotros con amigos tenían wifi y se hacia muy comodo para conectarnos  con los que recien llegabanos a vivir a la ciudad  y no teniamos todavía internet aunque tenian un chico muy malo que nos corataban todo  para que no molestaramos

(Translated by Google)
It used to be more of a family atmosphere; the kids would get together to study, and we and our friends had Wi-Fi, which made it really convenient to connect with those of us who had just moved to the city and didn't have internet yet. Although, they had a really mean kid who would cut us off so we wouldn't bother anyone.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNX052anVBRRAB
